meanings.definition: measure by or as if by a scale
pattern, make, regulate, set, measure, or estimate according to some rate or standard
take by attacking with scaling ladders
examples: The troops scaled the walls of the fort

meanings.definition: climb up by means of a ladder
measure with or as if with scales
size or measure according to a scale
examples: This model must be scaled down

meanings.definition: having the body covered or partially covered with thin horny plates, as some fish and reptiles
(used of armor) having overlapping metal plates attached to a leather backing
